message:
refactor: extract AnimatedNumber component and fix lint errors

components/animated-number.tsx (NEW):
- Extract reusable AnimatedNumber component from stats-grid
- Supports easeOutExpo animation, reduced motion, decimals
- Screen reader accessible with sr-only fallback

components/stats-grid.tsx:
- Simplify to use new AnimatedNumber component
- Remove duplicated animation logic

components/x-stats-card.tsx:
- Add eslint-disable for legitimate one-time flag pattern
- Simplify animation state management

components/tldr-hero.tsx:
- Minor improvements

lib/content.ts:
- Minor content adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
